_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: When the same lines were tested in the less stringent NRG mouse strain, the NF1-deficient lines developed tumors with 100% penetrance
details: NF1-deficient iHSC lines developed tumors with 100% penetrance in NRG mice, compared to 50% in athymic nude mice
